name: gtm-icp
description: GTM-as-code: a backend-free Claude plugin that finds B2B accounts matching your ICP, then enriches, classifies and scores them into a prioritized target list for outreach — grounded on your own corpus, bring your own keys.

apollo_api_key.title: Apollo API key
apollo_api_key.description: Apollo.io API key used by the enrich skill for firmographic + contact enrichment (sync REST). Leave blank to run enrich in --local mode (firmographic-only, no paid vendor).

perplexity_api_key.title: Perplexity API key
perplexity_api_key.description: Perplexity API key for the discover skill's internet-grounded account research. Leave blank to disable discovery; you can still enrich/classify accounts you supply directly.

k2_api_host.title: K2 API host
k2_api_host.description: Base URL of a Knowledge2 corpus API (e.g. https://api.knowledge2.ai). When set, classify/personalize ground their reasoning on your private corpus via the bundled stdio MCP shim. Leave blank to ground on local corpus files instead.

k2_api_key.title: K2 API key
k2_api_key.description: K2 API key sent to the K2 API host as `x-api-key`. Required when k2_api_host is set.
